headlines: Strait of Hormuz Closes Again After US Refuses to Lift Naval Blockade
IMF Warns Middle East War Is Pushing Global Economy Toward Recession
Mass Shooting in Wartime Kyiv Kills Six as Gunman Born in Russia Opens Fire
Iran's Internet Blackout Reaches 50 Days With Door-to-Door Satellite Dish Seizures
regional_headlines: Spain Bypasses Parliament to Legalise Up to 500,000 Undocumented Migrants by Royal Decree
Norway's Oil Exports Hit All-Time Record as Hormuz Closure Reshapes European Energy Supply
Royal Navy Shadowed Russian Frigate Escorting Sanctioned Tankers Through English Channel
UK Attorney General Rules Military Cannot Board Russian Shadow Fleet Vessels Under International Law
Dutch Civil Servants Strike Forces Historic Parliamentary Shutdown and Restarts Wage Talks
meanwhile: Researchers published results showing a malaria vaccine using modified RNA produced durable immunity in adults across three African trial sites.
A Pew Research survey found that fewer than one in three adults under 30 in Western Europe now identify with any organised religion.
A large study published in The Lancet linked ultra-processed food consumption to measurably faster cognitive decline in adults over 50.

headlines: Somalia enters constitutional vacuum as parliament term expires without succession plan
Zimbabwe declares state of disaster after commuter bus explosion kills 18 on major highway
Japan pledges 10 billion dollars to Southeast Asian countries hit by Middle East energy crisis
Hungary opposition wins two-thirds majority ending Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule
Two school shootings in Turkey within 28 hours kill at least 10 and trigger nationwide teacher strike
China eliminates all tariffs on imports from 53 African countries starting May 1
Pope visits Cameroon conflict zone as separatists announce three-day ceasefire
